Purpose. Tata Play Limited (formerly known as ‘Tata Sky Limited’) (hereinafter referred to as ‘Tata Play’) having its registered office at Unit 301 to 305, 3rd Floor, Windsor, Off C.S.T. Road, Kalina, Santacruz (East), Mumbai – 400 098 is committed to protecting any personal information that We may receive while You access the Tata Play Services or participate in any of the activities connected with Tata Play Services. In particular, We believe it is important for You to know how We treat information about You that We may receive from Tata Play Services or any other manner submitted by You. This Privacy Policy is devised to help You feel more confident about the privacy and security of Your personal details. When You leave your contact details, please note that We are not bound to reply. ‘You’ shall mean You, and ‘Yourself’ interpreted accordingly. ‘We’/‘Us’ means Tata Play Limited and ‘Our’ interpreted accordingly. ‘Users’ means the Users of Tata Play Services collectively and/or individually as the context allows.

When You choose to interact with Us by availing or subscribing to our Tata Play Services or Our products or services, by participating in Our user database or interacting with Our Support Team, You acknowledge that Your personal information will be treated as described in this Privacy Policy.

Eligibility. Tata Play Services are not intended for persons under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly solicit or collect personal information from or about children, and We do not knowingly market Our products or services to children.Eligibility. Tata Play Services are not intended for persons under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly solicit or collect personal information from or about children, and We do not knowingly market Our products or services to children.

The Information We Collect. We receive both information that is directly provided to Us, such as personal information You provide when You visit or avail Tata Play Services, and information that is passively or automatically collected from You, such as information collected from the browser or device You used to access Our Tata Play Services or any of them. In this Privacy Policy, we refer to all this as the ‘User Information’. To explain further,

Information You Provide To Us. There are portions of Tata Play Services where We may need to collect personal information from You for a specific purpose. For e.g. You can register to sign up for an account (‘User Account’), register for an event, ask for support, etc. In the course of these various offerings, We often seek to collect from You various forms of information, including but not limited to: Your name, address, e-mail address, telephone number, fax number, date of birth, occupation, and financial information. At some instances, You may also be able to submit information about other people. For example, You might submit a person's name and e-mail address to assist You to manage Your User Account. This information may include, for instance, a recipient's name, address, e-mail address, and telephone number. For applying to our Programs, you may also have to submit a copy of Your documents like proof of identity and proof of address, bank statements, and income tax returns.

Information That is Automatically Collected. In general, You may visit some of the Tata Play Services features without telling Us who You are or revealing any information about Yourself. We, and Our third party service providers or other business associates or partners (collectively ‘Partners’) may use automated means to collect various types of information about You, Your computer or other device used to access Tata Play Services. A representative, non-exhaustive list of the types of automatically collected information may include: network or Internet protocol address and type of browser You are using (e.g., Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Internet Explorer), the type of operating system You are using, (e.g., Microsoft Windows or Mac OS), mobile network, device identifiers, device settings, browser settings, the web pages of the Tata Play Services You have visited, Tata Play Services visited before and after You visited our Tata Play Services, the type of handheld or mobile device used to view or avail the Tata Play Services (e.g., iOS, Android), location information, and the content and advertisements You have accessed, seen, forwarded and/or clicked on. Please see our Section titled Cookies, for more information about how the foregoing information may be collected and used.

Such communications from Us may include advertising for third party companies or organisations.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: If You choose not to share the User Information. If You choose not to provide Us with the User Information described within this policy, then We may not be able to entertain Your Application or allow You to use the Tata Play Services or deal with us in any manner. We also may not be able to customize Our content, Tata Play Services and communications for Your preferences.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: Pixels, Cookies and Web Becons. You should be aware that information and data may be automatically collected through the Use of Cookies or web beacons or similar tracking technologies. "Cookies" are text files placed in your computer browser that store basic information that a Tata Play Services can use to recognize repeat site visits and as an example, recall Your name if this has been previously supplied. We may use this to understand Your service and/or internet usage, observe behaviour and compile aggregate data in order to improve or customize our products, services offerings or the Tata Play Services, target the advertising and assess general effectiveness of such advertising. Cookies do not attach to Your system and damage Your files. If You do not want information collected through the Use of Cookies, there is a simple procedure in most browsers that allows You to deny or accept the Cookie feature. Note, however, that "personalised" services may be affected if the cookie option is disabled. For example, We may use Cookies to personalize Your experience at our Tata Play Services (e.g., to recognize You by name when You return to Our Tata Play Services), save your password in password-protected areas. We also may use Cookies or other tracking technologies to help Us offer You products, offerings or services that may be of interest to You when You visit Tata Play Services. We or a third party platform with whom We work may place or recognize a unique cookie on your browser to enable You to receive customized offers, services on this Tata Play Services. These Cookies contain no information intended to identify You personally. The Cookies may be associated with de-identified demographic or other data linked to or derived from data You voluntarily have submitted to Us (e.g., your email address) that we may share with a service provider solely in hashed, non-human readable form.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: We and our Partners may also use "web beacons" or clear GIFs, or similar technologies, which are small pieces of code placed on Our Tata Play Services or in an email, to monitor the behaviour and collect data about the visitors viewing Our Tata Play Services or email. For example, web beacons may be used to count the users who visit a web page or to deliver a cookie to the browser of a visitor viewing that Tata Play Services. Web beacons may also be used to provide information on the effectiveness of our email campaigns (e.g., open rates, clicks, forwards, etc.). Third parties, including Facebook, may use cookies, web beacons, and other storage technologies to collect or receive information from our websites and elsewhere on the internet and use that information to provide measurement services and target ads. You can opt-out of the collection and use of information for ad targeting, and access a mechanism for exercising such choice by visiting http://www.aboutads.info/choices and http://www.youronlinechoices.eu/

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: Security and Data Storing. Security is very important to Us. All security procedures are in place to protect the confidentiality, integrity and availability of Your User Information. We maintain strict physical, electronic, and administrative safeguards to protect Your User Information including your personal information from unauthorized or inappropriate access, use, or disclosure. The User Information and/or Data may be stored in India and/or outside India or in physical form and/or electronic form and/or on cloud as deemed fit by Tata Play. We ensure that when We share Your information with third parties, We contractually require such third parties to follow reasonable security practices and take adequate security measures to ensure the security of Your information.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: Information Sharing and Disclosures. We may share or disclose the User Information as follows:

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: To service providers or Partners that we have engaged to perform business-related functions on our behalf. This may include without limitation service providers or Partners that: (a) conduct research and analytics; (b) create content; (c) provide customer, technical or operational support; (d) conduct or support marketing (such as email or advertising platforms); (e) fulfill orders and user requests; (f) handle payments; (g) host our services, forums and online communities; (h) administer the Tata Play Services; (i) maintain databases; (j) otherwise support our Services and (i) testing of any or all Tata Play Services.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: In response to regulatory and/or legal process, for example, in response to a court order or a subpoena, a law enforcement or quasi-judicial body or government agency's request or similar request from industry bodies.With third parties in order to investigate, prevent, or take action (in our sole discretion) regarding potentially illegal activities, suspected fraud, situations involving potential threats to any person, us, or the Tata Play Services, or violations of our policies, the law or our Terms of Use, to verify or enforce compliance with the policies governing our Tata Play Services.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: We may transfer some or all of User Information if We, or one of our business units, undergoes a business transition, like a merger, acquisition by another company, or sale of all or part of our assets, or if a substantial portion of our or of a business unit’s assets is sold or merged in this way.We may share the User Information with Our affiliates or group companies, so they can provide, improve and communicate with You about their own, or their marketing partners’ products and services.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: We reserve the right to disclose and/or transfer the User Information to our Partners in India or outside India. We will comply with all relevant Data Protection legislation in relation to the period for which We retain any User Information.In addition to the above, We release User Information only when it is permitted under the law or required by law for legal compliance and law enforcement (including to government agencies with statutory law enforcement responsibilities, and/or to Your Internet Service Provider or network administrator); to protect Our or Your rights, property, or safety and the rights, property and safety of Our users, or others, and where We reasonably believe that disclosure is necessary.

decoder_heading: How We may use the User Information
ident_heading: How We may use the User Information
heading_content_part: Protection of User Information. We will take all reasonable steps to protect the User Information that We hold from misuse, loss, or unauthorized access or modification.Right to access or correct User Information. You may request access to any User Information We hold about You at any time by contacting us. Your request will be processed in accordance with the prevailing law. You will need to verify your identity. We may not be able to grant access to some information if granting such access would interfere with the privacy of others.

heading_content_part: Dispo

sal of User Information. We retain User Information for as long as it is required for the purposes stated in this Privacy Policy. We take all reasonable measures to delete, dispose, anonymize or isolate User Information when we no longer have a legitimate need to process such User Information, as We deem fit.

Governing Law and Jurisdiction. This Privacy Policy is governed by and operated in accordance with the laws of India. If any of the parties wish to seek legal recourse, they may do so by using the sole and exclusive courts in New Delhi.

Updates. We may change this privacy policy from time to time and You should check these regularly. Your use of the Tata Play Services will be deemed an acceptance of the privacy policy existing at that time.
